name: Egg Ribbon Soup (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the broth to a boil.
2. Add the greens and bring back to a simmer.
3. Right before serving, pour the beaten eggs into the soup; they should curdle into ribbon-shaped strands.
4. Season to taste with salt and pepper and remove from heat.
5. Ladle into soup bowls and sprinkle Parmesan over top.
Yield: 4 servings
